/home/witsa/tools/intel/oneapi/mpi/2021.17/bin/mpiifx -fPIC  -g -O2 -shared -nofor-main -Wl,-soname,libscalapackfx.so -o libscalapackfx.so CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/blacs.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/blacsfx.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/blacsgrid.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/libscalapackfx.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/linecomm.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/pblas.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/pblasfx.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/scalapack.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/scalapackfx.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/scalapackfx_common.f90.o CMakeFiles/scalapackfx.dir/scalapackfx_tools.f90.o  -lmkl_scalapack_lp64 -lmkl_blacs_intelmpi_lp64 -lmkl_intel_lp64 -lmkl_intel_thread -lmkl_core -liomp5 -lpthread -lm -ldl
